title: Appropriation of funds
doc_html:
§129.  Appropriation of funds

A police jury may appropriate, from funds available for that purpose, the necessary funds to finance the operation of a parish development board created pursuant to the provisions of this Subpart.
doc_text:
§129.  Appropriation of funds
A police jury may appropriate, from funds available for that purpose, the necessary funds to finance the operation of a parish development board created pursuant to the provisions of this Subpart.
